sentences.english: My favorite game is a card game called Uno.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 게임은 우노라는 카드 게임이에요.

sentences.english: I play it with my family after dinner.
The rules are simple so anyone can play.
sentences.korean: 규칙이 간단해서 누구나 할 수 있어요.

sentences.english: We always laugh a lot when someone gets a Draw Four card.
sentences.korean: 누군가 드로 포 카드를 받으면 항상 많이 웃어요.

sentences.english: My younger brother always wins because he is very lucky.
sentences.korean: 남동생이 항상 이겨요. 매우 운이 좋아서요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
